sections: Frozen full-file baseline at git:214a5b8eb182fce74478df49d4f55d226d65fdf5 with SHA-256 c7f61db209a81ba20690f365b4069dd01f11e395335bfa10d2ce21143cc2985d
Redesign Review 1 exact subject and two Required findings

contracts_and_gates: Human decision: abandon the automatic semantic-routing design and retain only mechanical eight-leaf decomposition with explicit future packet/dispatch selection
Redesign Review 1 Required finding 1: freeze exact leaf H1 bytes and fail missing/changed/additional scaffold
Redesign Review 1 Required finding 2: prove manifest membership against all changed non-dispatch files and fail forbidden runtime/HCM-0.5 paths
Subject manifests contain current reviewed bytes only; unchanged contextual authority stays in authority_refs and/or contracts_and_gates
This is terminal Redesign Review 2. No Review 3 is allowed. If not CLEAN, abandon HCM-0.9 and retain the monolith
allowed_scope: Replay and review the exact nine-file remediated planning subject read-only.
Independently re-evaluate both Redesign Review 1 Required findings against the current subject and frozen Git baseline.
Verify exact H1 bytes, eight contiguous spans, body reconstruction, manifest-membership equality with additive review-dispatch exemption, and forbidden-scope negative proof.
Review the complete simplified plan for cohesion, executability, rollback, immutable history, explicit future leaf selection, and absence of automatic semantic routing.
Run read-only Markdown, scope, archive, handoff, Git, and GitNexus checks as useful.
non_goals: No edits, commits, new dispatches, handoff records, ledger writes, or user task hops by the reviewer.
No decomposition or edit of 05-contracts-schemas-and-gates.md; no HCM-0.9 execution.
No semantic dependency audit, automatic routing design, Rust, Cargo, runtime, CLI, Tauri, Substrate, SDK/public API, HCM-0.5, or unrelated planning improvement.
Do not rely on parent validation or Review 1 conclusions; independently judge the exact current subject and live authority.
tasks: Replay the sorted nine-path SHA-256 manifest and fingerprint; verify all current changed non-dispatch subject files are included and both additive redesign review dispatches are the only membership exemptions.
Verify the frozen baseline and independently derive eight spans, exact span/body/file digests, 48 H2/22 H3 counts, fence-safe boundaries, and complete ordered reconstruction.
Verify all eight exact H1 byte strings and the single following blank-line rule are authoritative, and that missing/changed/additional H1/scaffold has a required negative fixture.

Verify the manifest-completeness algorithm covers tracked and untracked changes from execution-start HEAD, explains the self-referential review-dispatch exemption, and requires staged equality before commit.
Verify scope uses an exact approved-path allowlist and has negative fixtures for runtime and HCM-0.5 paths, not merely git diff --check.

Review the complete simplified topology, stable index/70 compatibility aliases, subject-versus-authority rule, immutable history, rollback, and explicit packet/dispatch leaf selection without semantic inference.
Return findings first ordered Critical, Required, Optional, Nit with exact file/line evidence and smallest remediation. Return CLEAN only when no actionable finding remains.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the complete manifest subject, frozen baseline, or required read-only validation is unavailable.
Return Critical or Required rather than authorizing decomposition, execution, automatic semantic routing, historical rewrite, Rust/runtime work, HCM-0.5, or unrelated improvement.
Do not modify repository state or write orchestration artifacts.
repo_truth: Planning/control-only terminal Redesign Review 2 candidate on feat/handbook-contract-membrane at HEAD 76419b074d9ee406b41c89c0ed1413c206ad9b4f. The nine manifest files are the only bytes under review. The single authorized remediation freezes eight exact leaf H1 strings, rejects missing/changed/additional scaffold, defines review-set equality to every changed non-dispatch path from execution-start HEAD, narrowly exempts additive HCM-0.9 review dispatches, requires staged equality, and adds forbidden runtime/HCM-0.5 negative fixtures. The prior trigger/route design remains abandoned historical evidence. HCM-0.9 execution is not authorized in this session.
